graph TD
A-->B
B -->C
C-->|back1|A
C  -->|back2|B
---
+---+        
|   |        
| A |<---+   
|   |    |   
+---+    |   
  |      |   
  |      |   
  |      |   
  |      |   
  v      |   
+---+    |   
|   |    |   
| B |<-back1 
|   |    |   
+---+    |   
  |      |   
  |      |   
  |    back2 
  |      |   
  v      |   
+---+    |   
|   |    |   
| C |----+   
|   |        
+---+
